message:
feat(microsoft365,pinecone,google-ai): new mail operations, index lifecycle, and provenance tracking

Expand the operation surface for three connectors with new capabilities.

Microsoft 365 — 6 new mail operations:
- m365.mail.search_messages: full-text Graph search (read-only)
- m365.mail.list_threads: conversation thread grouping (read-only)
- m365.mail.list_attachments: list message attachments (read-only)
- m365.mail.add_attachment: attach files to draft messages (medium risk)
- m365.mail.reply_message: reply to existing message (high risk,
  interactive approval required)
- m365.mail.forward_message: forward emails (high risk, interactive
  approval required)
- Updated manifest with new operation definitions, rate limit pools,
  and interface hash

Pinecone — 2 new index lifecycle operations:
- pinecone.create_index: create a new index (medium risk)
- pinecone.delete_index: delete an index and all data (high risk,
  dangerous, interactive approval required)
- New client methods with wiremock-backed unit tests
- New pinecone.indexes.write rate limit pool in manifest

Google AI — response provenance tracking:
- Append provenance metadata to generate_content and
  generate_content_stream responses: source, model, integrity
  ("untrusted"), has_tool_calls (boolean FunctionCall detection),
  and chunk_count for streaming responses
- Enables downstream audit trail for AI-generated content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000

+[provides.operations."m365.mail.add_attachment".ai_hints]

+common_mistakes = ["Passing malformed attachment payloads without @odata.type."]

+[provides.operations."pinecone.create_index"]
+description = "Create a new index"
+capability = "pinecone.indexes.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations."pinecone.create_index".input_schema]
+required = [
+    "name",
+    "dimension",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."pinecone.create_index".input_schema.properties.dimension]
+type = "integer"
+

+[provides.operations."pinecone.create_index".input_schema.properties.name]

+
+[provides.operations."pinecone.create_index".input_schema.properties.spec]
